item.title: Risk Assessment
item.description: Assess and mitigate risks effectively with AppOmni's comprehensive risk assessment services.

item.title: How Great CISOs Make SaaS Security a Priority for Business Leaders
item.description: IT and security reviews alone fall hopelessly short of securing the SaaS estate. See how smart CISOs run effective SaaS security programs.

item.title: Employee Spotlight: Sarah Osburn, Sr. Technical Account Manager @ AppOmni
item.description: Meet Sarah Osburn, a Senior Technical Account Manager at AppOmni in our ‘Employee Spotlight’ series where we highlight our talented employees.

item.title: Employee Spotlight: Nick Crouch, International Channel Director @ AppOmni
item.description: Meet Nick Crouch, an International Channel Director at AppOmni in our ‘Employee Spotlight’ series where we highlight our talented employees.

item.title: Employee Spotlight: Josh Rickard, Senior Software Engineer @ AppOmni
item.description: Meet Josh Rickard, a Senior Software Engineer on AppOmni’s Threat Detection team in our employee spotlight series where we highlight AppOmni talent.

item.title: LastPass and Okta Breaches: Security Steps to Take Right Now
item.description: See what the attacks against SaaS identity and credential providers LastPass and Okta mean — and what steps your company should take.

item.title: How SaaS Vendors Are Handling the OpenSSL Critical Flaw
item.description: Learn the different steps SaaS vendors are taking to handle the OpenSSL critical flaw, along with additional resources you can access.

item.title: Privileged Identity Management (PIM)
item.description: Learn how to ensure the bare minimum of privileged access is granted to the right people, at the right time, and for as long as that access is appropriate.

item.title: Importance of Continuous Monitoring and Automated Threat Testing for SaaS
item.description: Discover the unique challenges of SaaS security and learn why organizations need continuous monitoring and automated threat testing to protect their SaaS data.

item.title: Payroll Fraud: Analyzing the Attack Lifecycle of a Direct Deposit Scam
item.description: Learn how direct deposit payroll fraud occurs and how to identify the signals available in audit logs to support threat hunting & detection.

item.title: What is the 0ktapus Breach? Key Lessons for SaaS Security Teams
item.description: What the 0ktapus breach reveals about SaaS security risks and how you can prevent attacks with continuous SSPM and threat detection.

item.title: AppOmni Raises $70 Million Series C Led by Thoma Bravo
item.description: Today we announced our $70 million Series C. The new funding will enable us to continue our momentum in SaaS security and to cement our leadership position in the space.

item.title: Salesforce Guest User Log Analysis
item.description: Salesforce has two primary avenues for obtaining event data from a Salesforce org: Event Monitoring and Real-Time Event Monitoring. Discussing the specific differences between these two offerings is outside the scope of this article; however, read the essential highlights.

item.title: Forging the Path to the Future of SaaS Security with the AppOmni Developer Platform
item.description: Learn how AppOmni is forging the path to the future of SaaS security by making the AppOmni Developer Platform available to partners, customers and SaaS vendors.

item.title: How to Address Log4j’s Potential Impact on Your SaaS Ecosystem
item.description: Learn about Log4j and its potential vulnerabilities for SaaS applications, and what can be done in order to protect their systems.

item.title: Accenture Partners with AppOmni to Enhance Salesforce Security and Tackle SaaS Misconfiguration Risk
item.description: Hear from Rex Thexton and Andrew Triplett on how Accenture and AppOmni team up to tackle SaaS misconfiguration risks.

item.title: Navigating the Complexities of SaaS Threat Detection
item.description: Learn how to navigate the complexities of SaaS threat detection and see what AppOmni does to help tackle threat detection for SaaS applications.

item.title: Elevate SaaS Security With Closed Loop Zero Trust
item.description: Learn about Closed Loop Zero Trust (ZT) and how AppOmni’s patent-pending Zero Trust technology provides an end-to-end Zero Trust solution.

item.title: Introducing Zero Trust Posture Management (ZTPM): Extending Zero Trust Beyond Network Access
item.description: Get an introduction to Zero Trust Posture Management (ZTPM). Learn how it extends Zero Trust principles and helps enterprises establish Zero Trust architectures.

item.title: 2024 SaaS Security Forecast
item.description: Read the 2024 SaaS security predictions from 5 cybersecurity thought leaders around disclosures, AI-provoked breaches, third-party attacks, and misconfigurations.

item.title: The Qlik Cyber Attack: Why SSPM Is a Must Have for CISOs
item.description: Learn more about the cyberattack against internet-facing Qlik Sense and see how AppOmni secured their own environment from Qlik’s potential impact with SSPM.

item.title: Okta Breach Threat Intel Advisory
item.description: Learn more about recent IdP attacks, like the Okta compromises that impacted many Okta customers, and how AppOmni helps secure SaaS identities.

item.title: Handling SaaS Data Exposure Risks Due to Potential ServiceNow Misconfigurations
item.description: See the impact of customer-side SaaS app misconfigurations, like those recently reported on ServiceNow, and how a robust SSPM solution can mitigate possible risk.

item.title: Detecting and Preventing Okta Compromises with SSPM
item.description: Learn how the identity-centric attack occurred on Okta admin accounts and why an SSPM solution can detect and prevent sophisticated tactics which attackers are attempting.

item.title: Introducing the SaaS Event Maturity Matrix (EMM)
item.description: Learn about the Threat Detection framework for assessing SaaS audit logging from different SaaS platforms commonly used by enterprises.

item.title: Perceptions, SaaS Identities and AI
item.description: Cybersecurity perceptions, SaaS identities, and securing AI and LLMs: 3 key takeaways from Black Hat 2023

item.title: Introducing the AppOmni SaaS Identity Fabric
item.description: Learn from Chief Product Officer Harold Byun how AppOmni Identity Fabric secures and manages end-users, entitlements, and threat-based activity for all of SaaS.

item.title: How to Follow NCSC’s Cloud Security Guidance for SaaS
item.description: Learn how NCSC’s new Cloud Security Guidance on SaaS matches up with AppOmni’s key SaaS security capabilities.

item.title: TechnologyOne Breach Highlights the Need for SaaS Security
item.description: See how the TechnologyOne breach underscores the importance of a proactive SaaS Security strategy to safeguard your valuable data.

item.title: How SSPM Can Help Organizations Meet Cyber Essentials UK Requirements
item.description: Learn how a robust SSPM solution — like AppOmni — can help UK-based organizations to properly comply with the latest Cyber Essentials guidelines.
